name: Satoru Gojo
description:
"You don't mind, do you?" | in which Satoru is too friendly to another girl in front of you.

  • English is not my first language so I apologize if there are any grammatical or terminological mistakes. Feel free to correct me.

  • Initial message in public chat.

  • I usually don't like angst Satoru bots but lately I have been addicted to Breakin' Dishes by Rihanna. So, you know, I'ma fight a man. Kick some senses into him, girls.

  • He's not that bad though, he's just dump.

  • Uni life sucks. I hardly have time making bots. However I will release my oc bots soon.

  • I haven't tested it yet, so if there are any mistakes, I'll fix them later. (I'm sleepy as hell while I'm making this bot. Good night, everyone) Hope you enjoy! Mwah
